title: The polyethylene market is off to a good start, and agricultural films are expected to rise
contentHtml:
After returning from the Spring Festival holiday, international crude oil prices continue to rise. The cost side of polyethylene has strengthened, and the market has a strong willingness to pull up. Some prices have been adjusted upward, and some resources have been overreported. Downstream agricultural film factories have not yet fully resumed work, and demand follow-up is insufficient. Factory procurement is cautious and wait-and-see.

The stocks of polyolefin and two oils are destocked compared with yesterday.1million tons, reduced to98million tons, compared with the inventory in the same period last year (8410,000 tons) accumulated warehouse14Thousands of tons. Under the pressure of high domestic inventories, the demand for agricultural film has not yet recovered, and film factories have resumed operations one after another. Shed film factories have been started sporadically, and most factories have not resumed production yet. There are a small number of existing orders and reserve orders for mulch film production, and large-scale enterprises are gradually starting to start operations.5-7成左右，其他中小型厂零星开工。 Suppressed by the high inventories of the two oils and the relatively flat demand, agricultural film factories have a general purchasing mentality and are mainly cautious in purchasing.

During the Spring Festival, international crude oil continued to rise, supported by tensions in the Middle East. Futures opened high and fluctuated, petrochemical plants increased their prices significantly, and the market had a strong willingness to pull up. Due to the support from the cost side, PE will have a good start after the year, and it will also be a good start for this year's key year to achieve the goals and tasks of the "14th Five-Year Plan". Deadline2moon19Japan, Shandong market double anti-film9600-10000Yuan/tons, in terms of price, with high domestic inventories and relatively flat demand for agricultural film, there may not be much room for upward market growth. However, considering that the traditional peak season for agricultural film is approaching, factory orders are gradually accumulating, and the operating load will increase rapidly.2-3The amount of resources that need to be digested in the month has increased, suppressing the upward trend of the market. The agricultural film market is expected to be strong but the range is limited. It is recommended to pay more attention to the inventory of raw materials and the trend of crude oil.
titleZh: 聚乙烯市场开门红 农膜有望上探
contentHtmlZh:
春节假期归来，国际原油价格不断上探，聚乙烯成本端走强，市场拉涨意愿较强，部分挺价整理，部分资源高报，下游农膜厂暂未全面复工，需求跟进不足，工厂采购谨慎观望。

聚烯烃两油库存较昨日去库1万吨，降至98万吨，较去年同期库存（84万吨）累库14万吨。在国内库存高企压力下，农膜需求尚未恢复，地膜工厂陆续恢复开工。棚膜工厂零星启动，多数厂暂未恢复生产。地膜生产少量现有订单和储备订单，规模企业逐步启动，开工5-7成左右，其他中小型厂零星开工。受两油库存高企压制，以及叠加需求相对平淡下，农膜厂采购心态一般，谨慎刚采为主。

春节期间，国际原油受中东局势紧张支撑持续上扬，期货开盘高开震荡，石化厂挺价明显，市场拉涨意愿较强，由于成本端的支撑，对年后PE迎来开门红第一响,同时也为今年实现“十四五”规划目标任务的关键一年开好局。截止2月19日，山东市场双防膜9600-10000元/吨，就价位来看，国内库存高企、农膜需求相对平淡下，行情向上空间或许不大，但考虑到农膜传统小旺季即将来临，工厂订单逐步积累，开工负荷会迅速提升，2-3月份需要消化的资源量增加，压制行情上行幅度，预计农膜行情走势偏强但幅度有限，建议多关注原料库存情况和原油走势。
